Package io.cloudstub.core.spi

Class StubResponse

java.lang.Object
io.cloudstub.core.spi.StubResponse
public final class StubResponse extends Object
Immutable HTTP response returned by a StubHandler. Carries the status code, content type, body string, and any additional response headers the networking driver should send back. No WireMock type is exposed.

Use json(Map) to serialise a response body from plain JDK collections (the engine does the JSON encoding and escaping, so handlers never hand-write JSON), json(String) / xml(String) when a handler already holds a body string, or of(int, String, String) for full control over status and content type. Add protocol-specific headers (e.g. an S3 ETag) with withHeader(String, String).

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    CONTENT_TYPE_JSON
    Content type for AWS JSON-protocol services (SQS, Secrets Manager, DynamoDB).
    static final String
    CONTENT_TYPE_XML
    Content type for AWS query/XML-protocol services (SNS, legacy SQS).

  • Field Details

    • CONTENT_TYPE_JSON

      public static final String CONTENT_TYPE_JSON
      Content type for AWS JSON-protocol services (SQS, Secrets Manager, DynamoDB).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • CONTENT_TYPE_XML

      public static final String CONTENT_TYPE_XML
      Content type for AWS query/XML-protocol services (SNS, legacy SQS).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • json

      public static StubResponse json(String body)
      A 200 OK JSON response with the AWS JSON content type.

    • json

      public static StubResponse json(Map<String,?> body)
      A 200 OK JSON response whose body is serialised from a JDK map/list/value tree (Map, List, String, number/boolean). The engine performs the JSON encoding and string escaping.
      Parameters:
      body - the response object; values must be JSON-serialisable JDK types
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if body cannot be serialised to JSON

    • json

      public static StubResponse json(int status, Map<String,?> body)
      A JSON response with an explicit status, serialised from a JDK map/list/value tree (see json(Map)). Use for AWS JSON-protocol error responses, e.g. a 400 carrying __type and Message.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if body cannot be serialised to JSON

    • xml

      public static StubResponse xml(String body)
      A 200 OK XML response with the AWS query/XML content type.

    • xml

      public static StubResponse xml(XmlElement root)
      A 200 OK XML response whose body is rendered from an XmlElement tree, which performs the XML encoding and escaping.

    • of

      public static StubResponse of(int status, String contentType, String body)
      A response with an explicit status, content type, and body.

    • withHeader

      public StubResponse withHeader(String name, String value)
      Returns a copy of this response with an additional header. The Content-Type header is managed via contentType() and should be set through the factories, not here.

    • status

      public int status()

    • contentType

      public String contentType()

    • body

      public String body()

    • headers

      public Map<String,String> headers()
      Additional response headers beyond Content-Type; never null, possibly empty.
